reviews.review_description: This really does take me back to the 80’s. When I had my commodore Amiga 500. It’s great to see a similar game from my era that I can actually dive into. Well done to the developers. Any chance of some more like this?

Ever wondered if classic 1980 arcade games and a Super Nintendo had a love child? Yeah me too!  I was all smiles the entire time! 

Grew up in the 80’s and early 90’s your going to absolutely going to “get it” when you play it! 

For everyone else….

The rules are simple, shoot anything that moves at your own pace. There’s no losing, no dying…no quarters…a high score and 3 initials!  

This game is pure. 

Developers hats off to you for actually creating a nearly perfect game of this type! 

Will be excited to see what plans you have for this! If there are no plans that’s ok too! This game is perfect!

Immersive, like the basic grid design of the backgrounds a lot, love the audio. 

But - i would like to dodge some bullets as well. Maybe an additional mode could be offered? One for those who wants a more peaceful experience as is, and one more challenging!

Ah and a global high score list would be nice too to compete against other players.

Holy cow... this is EXACTLY what i needed in my library. It is Beautiful, with great music & is super-chill (nothing can hurt you 😆... i forgot that bit the 1st time i played)

Can't wait to use this as a first VR experience for friends & family that are a little nervous about trying VR at all, because they assume it's way too intense.

I hope the devs create More content down the road... I'd be happy to pay for it... TAKE MY $!!!

Sometimes it's the simplest of games that just really impress you in VR.

Beautiful graphics. Fun arcade gameplay.

Not sure if this is the full game or if it's a demo, but definitely keeping an eye out for updates/full game.

Highly recommended!!
A really awesome game, works so well in vr, can’t recommend it enough, thanks guys for a great retro game!😃😃😃😃

I love this game. Makes me wonder why there's so few really fun shooters out there. 
Where most vr shooters over do it to the point of absurdity this game finds great enjoyment in simplicity. 

The gun is fun to use and the projectile round is super satisfying to land a shot with. 

Enemies are pretty diverse and fun. 

Music and aesthetics are euphoric.


My criticisms are...
Despite the claim of no motion sickness, it's still totally possible to feel queezy in this game

Game makes use of 360 degree turn radius is a way that I feel is unnecessary for most games. Wish I could play without using my neck or back.

This game is just pure awesome, I love how chill it is. I was looking for a game that I can play while laying down. This so scratched that itch. Thanks for implementing smooth turning. I felt like I was in the Lawnmower Man movie. The devs definitely hit the nostalgia retro vibe. The music is awesome as well, it's very Tangerine Dream. I felt like I entered a 80's video game,and I loved it. I really hope they keep developing this farther. I would definitely pay money for a game like this.

This game is fantastic, how such a simple game like that can give me so much emotion. I have so many game in my Quest 2 but this one is so special. It is a dream for 80's players. Simple but immersive, retro design and color is so cool and what a 80's sountrack !!!! The Music is so good.
I Hope more update in the futur. Thanks devs for this Amazing game.

This game bought back so many happy memories of me as a young kid, getting home from school and turning on my wooden effect Atari and blasting colourful pixels into dust.

This is a simple yet addictive and a stunningly beautiful game with awesome music to add.
With 3 levels, 10 minutes long and a final boss to kill this is an absolute steel at the price of zero pounds.

This is a must download in my opinion.

You can watch my gameplay video on YouTube

 https://youtube.com/c/FunWithTheClicks

Fun with the Clicks is my YouTube channel, I do loads of VR gameplay so please check it out.

reviews.review_title: My favorite game. I look forward
reviews.review_description:
Hi there devs, please make more games. This one is great. You have the eye for important details; like balanced locomotion etc..
                          Thank you!
Need I say more?

Love the retro style and the simplicity of the game. The soundtrack is great too!

More please 😁

reviews.review_title: Pixel shooting in a perfect flow
reviews.review_description: This game is demanding but also relaxing at the same time. Flying through beautifully designed "Tron" styled lanscapes combined with driving music is really a blast. Perfect value for a decent price.

Does Centipede or space invaders ring a bell, did you hit the pixxelripped Atari 2600 ? 
than this is made for you.
also would pay 1€ for each level, 2,99 would be a price i would like topay !
Need more!

It’s short, it’s sweet, it’s hard as nails.
The music is ok… wish it was more 80’s. That said, the first level has a pretty good sound to it.
The graphics are crisp and original.
The gameplay is workable. 
But is it fun? Well that depends, do you like on rails, monotone shooters??

Hopefully the devs keep working on this one.
Best game ever! Love this arcade shooter, very cheap!

reviews.review_title: Imagine if we had this in the 80s!
reviews.review_description:
I am so glad I found this game. This is a stellar experience! It's like playing Galaga and Space Invaders in 3D all around you. The graphics are super bright and have that neon industrial look to it. The characters appear in front and behind you and fly over you so you are moving all around. And the soundtrack of the 80s synthesizer techno vibe that comes from it really puts you in the zone to shoot these arcade enemies!

I would highly highly recommend this to any 80s arcade gamer and anyone that enjoys that vibe you get from the 80s. Hard to describe but it is just awesome. If there is ever another game like this made by these guys I will absolutely be buying it! This is one of the best experiences I have had in VR honestly aside from Super Hot. It's just so immersive!

One question for the developers, what do you have to do to beat the Area 2 boss (spider)? I'm shooting the legs but it moves so dang rapidly I can't aim at it enough to kill it and unlock Area 3!

You can enjoy this without firing a single bullet. When it's too quiet, make sure you turn around!

Would love a "free movement over random terrain" option.
